<!--
PR template — kept available for future use. At v1 this repo is solo-dev
and commits land directly on main (no PRs); see CONTRIBUTING.md.
-->

## Summary

What changed and why. One paragraph.

## Linked issue

Closes #N

## How tested

- [ ] `just lint`
- [ ] `just typecheck`
- [ ] `just test`
- [ ] Manual verification (describe)

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] (Copy from the linked issue)

## Notes for review

Anything reviewers should know — caveats, follow-ups, alternatives considered.
